coincidences.png.description: This graph shows that the delay time can be varied in between 1.6-2.4 micro sec. The Linear gate seems to function like a plateau: coincidence / no coincidence. We chose to set the delay to 2.12 micro sec.

cali_plastic_scinti.description: including errorbars. concidering rates. compare the calibration spectra, select windows, focus on data obtained on 04-16

cali_NaI_scinti.description: including errorbars. considering rates. compare the calibration spectra, select windows, focus on data obtained on 04-16

compton_rate_spec_plastic.description: contains all measurements from compton. plastic scintillator.

compton_rate_spec_NaI.description: contains all measurements from compton. NaI(Ti) scintillator.

angle_vs_rate.png.description: we want to see what how the rates are dependant on the angles -> weekend measurement! Top is NaI, bottom is plastic!
